evidence.A1: per-task PASS/FAIL exists (CONTRACTS §4) but no aggregate completion metric
evidence.A2: independent reviewer runs the real gate end-to-end before any commit (CONTRACTS §2,§4)
evidence.A3: no benchmark or reproducible eval harness ships with the suite
evidence.A4: final whole-spec smoke + staleness unchecks affected work, but no tracked regression metric
evidence.B1: spec-anchored: specs drive build, code reviewed against them, not regenerated from spec
evidence.B2: REQ-N -> PLAN coverage -> tasks req: -> commit, but task-level req: link is optional
evidence.B3: upstream change flips downstream stale; change touching [x] task unchecks it (CONTRACTS §6)
evidence.B4: executor stops and logs BLOCKER, routes upstream; never hacks around (CONTRACTS §5)
evidence.C1: minimal lean artifacts, optional sections marked, explicit anti-bloat stance
evidence.C2: gate runs install->lint->test->build->run for real, exercises acceptance black-box
evidence.C3: decisions.md + requirement map + Refs footers, but decisions/req: are lazy/optional
evidence.C4: no absolute paths, self-contained portable skills, reference-only ticket binding
evidence.D1: earned-ceremony north star; explicit anti-goals (no waves/orchestrator/validators)
evidence.D2: zero config: no orchestrator, no config file, no build step
evidence.D3: fresh minimal self-contained context per task: constitution+memory+one task
evidence.D4: built for a ticket in an existing system, but no dedicated codebase-mapping/adopt step

note: Baseline scorecard. Strong on rigor/quality/DX; weak on empirical measurement (Dim A). Competitor reference scores (same date): OpenSpec ~53, Spec Kit ~52, BMAD ~44, Kiro ~44.
